title: Mahofall
description: Mahofall Create 0.6 modpack for the server Mahofall
body:
## This is the official modpack for the Mahōfall Minecraft server **Important notice** this modpack is not designed to work ouside the server so bugs may appear when playing singleplayer. The Mahofall Modpack was made for ease of use for the Mahōfall server players and quick downloading without any problems. The Modpack is focused around the Create Mod and addons created for the create mod. It also features many optimizations for both greate server expirence and well optimized rendering. Other Modpack features :
    • Biomes o' Plenty - Generates beautiful lanscapes that let you find the perfect place for your base
    • Open Parties and Claims - Lets you claim territories and protect your base on the server from other people
    • Create: Enchantment Industry - Creates powerful enchantments that make you almost immune to any kinds of attacks
    • Create: Copycats+ - Adds many block types that apply to any modded or vanilla blocks
    • Create: Sound of Steam - Lets you create beautiful music or instruments
    • Create : Stones & Create: Copper & Zinc - In combination add many useful recepies that arent in the base version of the Create mod and let you automate a lot of additonal Items and Blocks
    • Distant Horizons - Improves Minecraft rendering making you able to look much further without bigger performance drops
    • And Much More! - see the mod list below
Please report server bugs or crashes in our discord server.
Included Mods
    Tom's Simple Storage Mod
    Create: Hypertubes
    Kotlin for Forge
    Entity Culling
    Old God Apple Recipe
    Create Factory Logistics
    Mouse Tweaks
